title: athlete-enrollment — Eloquent observers
description: One observer enforces every write-time invariant: entitlement consumption, atomic conversion to TeamMember, state-machine transitions, capacity + waitlist handling, immutability of team/athlete/season, cross-tenant defense-in-depth. The atomic-conversion logic is delegated to EnrollmentAtomicityCoordinator binding — the observer only knows *whether* to convert; the coordinator encapsulates *how* (DB transaction + SELECT ... FOR UPDATE + create TeamMember + set team_member_id + fire events).

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `aen_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `athlete_enrollment.core` feature (defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when Athlete.tenant_id != enrollment.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when Team.tenant_id != enrollment.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when Season.tenant_id != enrollment.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)

creating → refuse when parent Athlete.status NOT IN ('active', 'paused') (returns `ENROLLMENT_ATHLETE_INACTIVE` — enforces athlete_active_or_paused rule; withdrawn/graduated/archived athletes cannot enroll)
creating → refuse when parent Team.status != 'active' (returns `ENROLLMENT_TEAM_INACTIVE` — enforces team_active rule)
creating → refuse when parent Season.status NOT IN ('registration_open', 'in_progress') (returns `ENROLLMENT_SEASON_NOT_OPEN` — enforces season_registration_open rule)
creating → set branch_id = athlete.branch_id (denormalised)
creating → refuse when active enrollment already exists for (tenant, season, athlete, team) via partial unique index (returns `ENROLLMENT_DUPLICATE`)
creating → consume 1 unit of `athlete_enrollment_slot` entitlement (scoped by season_id); refuse with `ENROLLMENT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED` when cap reached
creating → check team capacity: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM athlete_enrollments WHERE team_id=? AND season_id=? AND status IN ('confirmed', 'active') AND deleted_at IS NULL; if COUNT >= team.capacity:
→ if athlete_enrollment_waitlist entitlement ON: set status='waitlisted' + waitlist_position = (max waitlist_position for team + 1); fire EnrollmentCapacityExceeded + EnrollmentWaitlisted
→ else: refuse with TEAM_AT_CAPACITY
creating → refuse enrollment_type='provisional' when athlete_enrollment_provisional entitlement OFF (returns `ENROLLMENT_PROVISIONAL_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse enrollment_type='trial_converted' when source_trial_id unset (returns `ENROLLMENT_TRIAL_SOURCE_REQUIRED`)

creating → refuse enrollment_type='trial_converted' when source_trial.team_id != this.team_id OR source_trial.status != 'converted' (returns `ENROLLMENT_TRIAL_SOURCE_INVALID` — enforces trial_source_matches_team_and_season rule)
creating → set status='submitted' when unset
creating → refuse status IN ('active', 'completed', 'expelled', 'expired') on create (terminal + activated states cannot be initial)
creating → refuse price_amount_cents > 0 AND price_currency unset (returns `ENROLLMENT_CURRENCY_REQUIRED`)
creating → fire EnrollmentSubmitted
creating post-commit → SnapshotAgeGroupOnEnrollmentSubmitted hook sets age_group_snapshot_id from athlete.current_age_group_id + fires EnrollmentAgeGroupSnapshotSet
creating post-commit → age_group_snapshot_matches_team_age_group rule fires as SOFT-WARN when mismatch — EnrollmentAgeGroupSnapshotMismatched (informational)
creating post-commit (for enrollment_type='provisional') → fire EnrollmentProvisionalCreated
updating team_id → REFUSE (returns `ENROLLMENT_TEAM_ID_IMMUTABLE`). An enrollment belongs to one team for its lifetime
updating athlete_id → REFUSE (returns `ENROLLMENT_ATHLETE_ID_IMMUTABLE`)
updating season_id → REFUSE (returns `ENROLLMENT_SEASON_ID_IMMUTABLE`)
updating branch_id → REFUSE (immutable snapshot from athlete.branch_id at create; if the athlete's branch changes via Wave 3b transfer, existing enrollments stay tied to the original branch)
updating age_group_snapshot_id → REFUSE (returns `ENROLLMENT_AGE_GROUP_SNAPSHOT_IMMUTABLE` — SNAPSHOT semantics; the value is frozen at submission for the enrollment's lifetime)
updating enrollment_type → REFUSE (returns `ENROLLMENT_TYPE_IMMUTABLE`; enrollment shape is decided at submission)
updating source_trial_id → REFUSE (immutable)

updating position_preference / jersey_number_preference / enrollment_notes / coach_notes / metadata → fire EnrollmentUpdated (umbrella; also EnrollmentPositionAssigned when position_assigned mutates specifically + EnrollmentJerseyAssigned when jersey_number_assigned mutates)
updating status transitions: submitted → payment_pending / consent_pending / confirmed / waitlisted / expired — allowed
updating status payment_pending → consent_pending / confirmed / expired — allowed; requires payment_status='paid' for the confirmed transition
updating status consent_pending → confirmed / expired — allowed; requires consent_snapshot present + all required consents true for the confirmed transition

updating status → confirmed → refuse when consent_snapshot is null OR required consents not set (enforces consent_snapshot_present_when_confirmed rule); set confirmed_at = now(); capture consent_snapshot from athlete's current state; fire EnrollmentConfirmed

updating status confirmed → active → invoke EnrollmentAtomicityCoordinator: opens DB transaction, SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on this row + on team_members table for this team, creates teams::TeamMember with (tenant_id, team_id, member_type='athlete', member_id=this.athlete_id, role_on_team='player', status='active', joined_at=now(), jersey_number=this.jersey_number_assigned), sets this.team_member_id = new_team_member.id + this.activated_at = now(); commits transaction. On failure: rolls back + fires EnrollmentAtomicityFailed (P1). On success: fires EnrollmentActivated + EnrollmentTeamMemberCreated
updating status active → completed → set completed_at = now(); release 1 unit of athlete_enrollment_slot; fire EnrollmentCompleted

updating status active/confirmed → withdrawn → refuse when withdrawal_reason unset (returns `ENROLLMENT_WITHDRAWAL_REASON_REQUIRED`); set withdrawn_at + withdrawn_by_user_id; release 1 unit of slot; cascade: soft-delete the linked TeamMember; fire EnrollmentWithdrawn

updating status active → expelled → refuse when withdrawal_reason unset (repurposed as expulsion_reason); set withdrawn_at (using this field for both terminal states) + withdrawn_by_user_id; release 1 unit of slot; cascade: soft-delete the linked TeamMember; fire EnrollmentExpelled

updating status waitlisted → submitted (promotion) → refuse when caller is not the PromoteWaitlistedEnrollmentsJob context (checked via Bus::isDispatchedFromJob or via a dedicated promote route + permission); clear waitlist_position + waitlisted_at; fire EnrollmentPromotedFromWaitlist
updating status {submitted, payment_pending, consent_pending, waitlisted} → expired → set expired_at = now(); release 1 unit of slot; fire EnrollmentExpired
updating status any → any (invalid transition) → refuse via valid_enrollment_status_transition rule with `ENROLLMENT_STATUS_TRANSITION_INVALID`
updating payment_status → fire EnrollmentPaymentStatusChanged
updating consent_snapshot → fire EnrollmentConsentSnapshotUpdated; also fire EnrollmentConsentReceived when prior state was missing required consents + new state has them
updating jersey_number_assigned → refuse when the value conflicts with another active enrollment on the same team via partial unique index (returns `ENROLLMENT_JERSEY_NUMBER_TAKEN`)
deleting (soft-delete) → refuse when status IN ('active', 'confirmed') — must transition to a terminal state first (returns `ENROLLMENT_ACTIVE_CANNOT_DELETE`)
deleting (hard-delete) → RESTRICT while any Wave 4+ Attendance / Finance rows reference; allow only after 7-year retention
post-commit invariant recheck → if status transitioned to active AND team_member_id is null (atomicity failure), fire EnrollmentAtomicityFailed + ensure the reconciler picks it up
